taxonomySlugReference: Draft slugs cross-checked against prisma/seed-data/music-taxonomy.generated.json (Stage 3 workbook export). Not enforced against DB at runtime.

branches.explainHuman: Draft recipe for calm café breakfast contexts: favour easy acoustic moods and light grooves.
branches.notes: Omitted soft-jazz (no slug). Omitted hard-rock in avoid list (no slug). chill-mellow aliases include Calm.

branches.explainHuman: Draft recipe for sunny outdoor leisure programming (no dedicated venue taxonomy slug yet).
branches.notes: Triggers intentionally empty pending venue/context tags. Skipped heavy-rock (no slug); aggressive-raw proxies heavy intensity. tropical-house used instead of tropical; chill-out instead of chillout; reggae-dub instead of reggae.

branches.explainHuman: Draft recipe for golden-hour bar grooves leaning sensual and rhythmic.
branches.notes: Omitted afro-house and lounge-house (no slugs). organic-house is a loose lush-house substitute until lounge-house exists. No acoustic-led avoid slug in workbook — bias handled via boosts only.
